future_of_local_commerce: The future of local commerce is here
connects_buyers: shop_starter connects you with thousands of buyers near you.
digitize_sales: Digitize your sales and take your street or artisanal products to the next level effortlessly.
all_control_in_hand: All control in the palm of your hand
interactive_catalog_desc: Upload your products with photos, descriptions, and prices instantly.
geo_map_desc: Your clients will easily find you thanks to the live map.
order_management_desc: Keep track of who buys from you, what they want, and when to deliver.
simple_stats_desc: Know your weekly income visually and effortlessly.
cloud_scalability_desc: Your store will never go down even if you have hundreds of clients simultaneously.
modern_payment_desc: Flexible section to show your clients if you accept Nequi, Daviplata, or Cash.
process_simplified: We have simplified the process to the max. No code, no weird settings, just fill out your info and start selling.
register_vendor: Register as a VENDOR by filling in your basic information and confirming your phone number.
add_products_desc: Add photos, price, and description to each product. Make them look great!
make_business_visible:
Make your business visible
to the whole city
stop_local_only: Stop relying solely on local sales or word of mouth. Upload your products today and broaden your horizons.
